The '''Sith wyrm''' was a massive creature that lived on the [[Yavin 4/Legends|fourth moon of Yavin]] in large subterranean lairs.

==History==
[[File:Sith_Wyrm_JATM.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A Sith wyrm]]

The Sith wyrm was originally an infant [[Exogorth/Legends|exogorth]] that attached itself to [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]]'s [[Corsair (Derriphan-class)|battleship]]<ref name="DSS">''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]''</ref> in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Failing to tame the creature and seeing no other use for it,<ref name="DSS" /> Sadow subjected it to [[Sith alchemy/Legends|Sith alchemy]] so that it would serve as a guardian for the [[Temple of Fire]].<ref name="darklords4" />

The [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] worshiped the beast as a god<ref name="DSS" /> until [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] killed it<ref name="darklords4" /> a [[3997 BBY|millennium later]]<ref name="NEC" /> when the Massassi shaman [[Zythmnr]] tried to feed Kun to it. Unbeknown to Zythmnr, the spirit of [[Freedon Nadd]] engineered this conflict to manipulate Kun; Kun could only defeat it by using the power of a [[Sith talisman/Legends|Sith amulet]] and committing himself more fully to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]].<ref name="darklords4" />

As the Sith wyrms were later hunted by the Jedi during the [[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]], it is evident that the creature was not the only one of his kind.<ref name="Kotorcg">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 4]] {{1st}}
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 5]] {{Corpse}}
